reviews.review_description: Fun and addictive! If you enjoy paddle sports, definitely give this game a try. The characters' powers are varied and interesting, and the game runs smoothly on my Quest 2.

This sports game is a wonderful discovery, offering a Dragon Ball-style tournament adventure mode and a classic free-for-all mode against bots.
Our stylized characters compete using special moves and unique temporary perks.
The tutorial mode is comprehensive and very well-designed for immediate use.
We can't wait to discover each character's special moves, all different and interesting.
All this is supported by flawless technical execution; everything is fluid, fast, and fun, and we quickly master the arsenal of highly varied special moves.
The road to the final will be long and full of pitfalls, but also spectacular and fun!
A real favorite!
NOTE TO DEV:
I'd like a MR mode and a multiplayer mode to play against friends ;)
My video review (in french): https://youtu.be/rtHBG3gOJgw
